name: MAC-10 | 紫青之色
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been painted solid colors in indigo, blue and grey. Alex Kincaide, I'm sure you have many questions... please allow me to give you answers - The Phoenix and The Storyteller Part 1
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器使用紫青色、蓝色和灰色进行了整体喷漆。亚历克斯.金凯德，我相信你有着许多的疑问… 请允许我给你解答 -《凤凰战士与说书人（上）》
